title: Add silent screenshot capture on every click
description: When a click is captured, immediately call chrome.tabs.captureVisibleTab() to take a screenshot. Must be completely silent — no flash, no delay, no UI indication. Save as JPEG quality 60. Tag with click index and timestamp. Store in memory/IndexedDB (not network). Also add periodic screenshot every 10 seconds as fallback. Screenshots must not exceed 1920x1080.
tests: Click on page -> screenshot captured within 100ms, no visible flash
10 seconds pass without click -> periodic screenshot captured
Screenshot filename matches click index from clicks.json
50 clicks in a session -> 50 screenshots stored, no memory crash
notes: Screenshot capture in background.js using captureVisibleTab, IndexedDB storage, resize via OffscreenCanvas
